title: Founders Associate
office_cadence_note: Listing states only 'Location: Mill Hill, London (NW7) | Type: Full-time' — a physical address but NO explicit remote/hybrid/in-office or day-count sentence. Role is heavy on EA/diary/exec-cadence support to the founder, which strongly implies office-present (file location field carried 'in-office'), but the JD itself does not state cadence. Treat as UNSTATED, lean in-office; confirm before committing (NW7 = long Cambridge commute). Verified 2026-06-10.
working_week_note: RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-11 against the user's ACTUAL dealbreaker (weekend/6-7-day work only). Listing states only 'Mill Hill, London (NW7) | Full-time' — NO day-count and NO mention of weekends, Saturday, Sunday, or a 6/7-day week. Default to a standard Mon-Fri week. FINE — NOT a dealbreaker (the NW7-from-Cambridge commute is a logistics consideration, not a weekend-work issue).
key_evidence: StudioB: independent creative studio founded 2020, ~40 employees, creative agency + original content division. Clients incl. LEGO, Google, Netflix, Disney, Real Madrid. NOT an AI product company — a creative studio adopting AI workflows.

Role: force-multiplier to Founder/CEO. Owns exec cadence, implements automation/AI workflows, builds dashboards/reporting, delivers 2-3 strategic projects end-to-end. Progression from exec support (diary/scheduling) into project ownership.

Requirements: 2-5 yrs in consulting/strategy/media/production/startup; 'hands-on experience with AI tools or automation'; comfort with ambiguity, ownership, alignment without authority. Ryan's ~6.4yrs sits just above the band but founding-generalist + Claude-Code automation fit the AI-workflow ask well.
Salary not listed; creative-studio (non-VC) budgets in London for an FA likely modest — uncertain vs £50k floor. In-office Mill Hill NW7 = long commute from Cambridge until London relocation.
Screening: ~40 person studio, founder/CEO-led hire via own ATS (join.studiob.net) — moderate founder-read likelihood, not a faceless ATS.
Spike fit is weak: no crypto/community-growth or AI-product angle; the early bullets are heavy on EA/diary/scheduling (exec-support), which under-uses Ryan's GTM and fundraising spikes.
Domain mismatch: creative/media agency, not an AI or crypto product company per Ryan's target domain.
biggest_lever: Claude-Code automation/agent-building + founding-generalist 'turn ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams' (literal Minima FA bullet) maps directly onto the AI-workflows + strategic-projects part of the JD.
biggest_risk: Role front-loads executive-assistant/diary work and is a non-AI creative studio; risk of being mis-fit (over-experienced for the EA portion, off-domain) plus possible sub-£50k pay and a hard in-office NW7 commute.
apply_verdict: Apply only if open to a creative-studio chief-of-staff-style path and the EA-heavy ramp; moderate odds but weak domain/spike alignment.
recency_note: Published 2026-04-21 (49 days / 7.0wk, source: WebSearch on join.studiob.net listing). 4-8wk band -> G=32. Custom ATS shows no applicant count and listing still live/accepting. Aging but not stale; no repost evidence.
momentum_signals: POSITIVE: 'fast-growing creative production company' with 20M+ follower global audience; active high-profile client work in 2026 (Borderlands 4 CGI tour Lisbon/Berlin/London, M&S lingerie campaign, Tommy Fleetwood 20M+ IG views) — studio is busy and visible (WebSearch, 2026).

HIRING BREADTH: 4 concurrent open roles on own ATS (Founders Associate, Production Accountant, Social Media Manager/Analyst, VFX Artist) as of 2026-06-09 — broad-function hiring, not a single backfill (join.studiob.net/jobs).
FA STILL LIVE: Founders Associate (posted 2026-04-21, ~49d) confirmed still listed and accepting today; aging but not stale, no repost.

NEUTRAL: no funding/news momentum (privately-held creative studio, not VC-backed); social/PR cadence active but no explicit 'we're hiring/scaling' post naming this role. No layoff/negative signals found.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE 2026-06-10 via join.studiob.net (HTTP200, 'Apply for this job' active). JSON-LD datePosted CORRECTED to 2026-04-08 (was recorded 2026-04-21) = 63 days, now 8-12wk band. No repost. G_recency 32->18; callback_op 59->56.
operator_fit_note: PARTIAL - true FA/force-multiplier-to-founder role owning AI workflows + strategic projects (good operator map, founder-facing), but front-loads EA/diary/scheduling work and is a non-AI creative studio (off-domain).
